checks.name: Lock identifier and phase
checks.details: lock_id is P3-SPEC-LOCK-001 and phase is P3.

checks.name: Approved spec root binding
checks.details: root_sha256 equals the approved P3 spec input root.

checks.name: Review decision file root binding
checks.details: review_decision_file_root_sha256 equals the P3 review decision file root.

checks.name: Phase review decision binding
checks.details: review_decision_hash equals the approved P3 assurance review decision file hash.

checks.name: Tool identity binding
checks.details: created_by_tool.sha256 equals the current tooling/create_spec_lock.py hash.

checks.name: Schema minimum validation
checks.details: The generated lock contains lock_id, phase, root_sha256, files, and review_decision_hash.

checks.name: Lock file hash binding
checks.details: SPEC_LOCK_CREATION_RESULT.json created_lock.sha256 equals the current control/locks/P3_SPEC_LOCK.json sha256.

checks.name: Input bundle, schema, and tool hash binding
checks.details: Input bundle, schema, and tool hashes match current files and values recorded inside the lock.

checks.name: Phase readiness review binding
checks.details: The assurance review file hash and subject hash match the current approved review decision.

checks.name: Per-file lock entry binding
checks.details: Every generated output and review decision file listed inside the lock hashes to the value recorded by the lock.

checks.name: No-overwrite guard
checks.details: A second create_spec_lock.py write to the same output path is expected to fail and leave the existing lock hash unchanged.

checks.name: No implementation authorization
checks.details: The result remains not a BUILD_LOCK and not an implementation authorization.

checks.name: Generated result file text guard
checks.details: The created lock, review target, and generated result files parse cleanly and pass line-level text guard checks.

checks.name: Replay observations subject boundary
checks.details: Final command stdout, stderr, and subject hash are recorded in a supporting-only replay observation file so the generated review subject does not self-reference its own hash.

checks.name: Human review decision recorded
checks.details: REVIEW_DECISION.json approves the P3 SPEC_LOCK creation result subject hash and remains outside generated_outputs.

remaining_followups: P3 implementation workpacks still require explicit next-stage authorization.
Root P3 phase files are not updated by this result candidate.
P3 lock result is approved; next-stage work still requires explicit authorization.
